module.name: shortcut
module.description: A keyboard shortcut as a sequence of keys. The key combination is the block body, joined with "+", e.g. Ctrl+Shift+P. Renders inline.
module.aiSpec: Use to show a keyboard shortcut as styled <kbd> keys (e.g. for docs/tutorials). The body is the key combo written with "+" separators (e.g. `Ctrl+Shift+P`); each key is rendered as a separate styled key cap. Block module but renders INLINE, so it flows within text.

snippet.label: Shortcut
snippet.description: Key combination rendered as styled keys. Body = the combo, joined with "+".
